headline: Three Energy ETFs Are Yielding Over 2.5 Percent While Delivering 24 to 31 Percent Returns in 2026
summary: Energy sits in an unusual spot right now: it is paying real income while also producing the kind of capital gains that growth investors chase. The three biggest broad energy ETFs, iShares Global Energy ETF (NYSEARCA:IXC), Vanguard Energy ETF (NYSEARCA:VDE), and Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLE), are each up roughly 34% year to date ... headline: Oil Prices Slip Amid Trump Demands; Exxon Warns Of Nasty Surprise
summary: Oil prices remained lower on Friday morning after President Donald Trump laid out his demands for an Iran deal ahead of his "final determination."  Markets have been anticipating agreement on a 60-day U.S.-Iran ceasefire extension that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  Trump's Truth Social post included some items Iran has previously rejected, including the U.S. removing its enriched uranium.

headline: VYM Climbs 26% In a Year While Its Core Dividend Payers Extend Their Streaks
summary: The Vanguard High Dividend Yield Index Fund ETF Shares (NYSEARCA:VYM) is one of the simplest income vehicles in the market: it owns roughly 500 U.S. stocks that pay above-average dividends, weights them by market cap, and passes the cash through to shareholders.
